facts.description: The final featured grant winners are the top 3 eligible applications after all filters and ranking rules.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept any polished winner announcement image that clearly features exactly these three projects as winners. Application IDs may be omitted; the project names must be identifiable and not replaced by unselected applications.

facts.description: Selected winners must be displayed in the ranking order from highest to lowest.
facts.expected_value: Tree Canopy Fellows before Cool Roof Block before Flood Ready Neighbors
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept left-to-right, top-to-bottom, numbered placements, or another clear visual hierarchy as long as the order is Tree Canopy Fellows, then Cool Roof Block, then Flood Ready Neighbors.

facts.description: Each selected winner must show the correct project name, requested grant amount, and score label.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Grant amounts may be formatted as $42,000, $39,000, and $50,000 or equivalent whole-dollar formats. Score labels may use wording such as Score 94 or 94 pts, but values must be attached to the correct projects.

facts.description: Applications that are filtered out or rank below the top 3 cutoff must not appear as winners.
facts.canonical_answer: Only Tree Canopy Fellows, Cool Roof Block, and Flood Ready Neighbors should be announced as winners.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The image may use generic celebratory graphics, but it must not label or present any unselected application as a winner.

facts.description: Late or over-budget applications are excluded even with high scores.
facts.canonical_answer: Exclude Storm Drain Mapping and Porch Solar Library for dates after the inclusive deadline; exclude Heat Pump Co-op for requested_usd above 50000.
facts.semantic_acceptance: None of these projects should be shown as winners.

facts.description: Draft, test, internal, cancelled, or incomplete applications are excluded.
facts.canonical_answer: Exclude Home Energy Kits, Solar Pantry Pilot, Test Cooling Hub, Internal Sensor Trial, and Cancelled Cool Bus because they fail status or document requirements.
facts.semantic_acceptance: None of these projects should be shown as winners.

facts.description: Wrong-sector, wrong-round, and score-threshold applications are excluded.
facts.canonical_answer: Exclude River Mural Revival, Transit Shade Stops, and Youth Climate Lab for sector mismatch; exclude Archive Rain Barrel for the wrong program round; exclude Compost Heat Watch because score 80 equals the exclusive threshold and is not greater than 80.
facts.semantic_acceptance: None of these projects should be shown as winners.

facts.description: Eligible applications below the top 3 cutoff are not final winners.
facts.canonical_answer: Energy Coach Hotline and Rain Garden Crew pass filters but rank below the top 3 cutoff.
facts.semantic_acceptance: These projects should not be promoted as winners.

calculation_notes: Independent calculation: filter grant_applications.csv by sector=climate, status=eligible, documents_complete=yes, program_round=spring_2026, requested_usd<=50000, submitted_on<=2026-03-05, and score>80 because the score threshold is exclusive. Eligible rows are G207 Tree Canopy Fellows (score 94, community_priority 87, requested 42000), G208 Cool Roof Block (score 92, community_priority 90, requested 39000), G210 Flood Ready Neighbors (score 89, community_priority 95, requested 50000), G213 Energy Coach Hotline (score 88, community_priority 86, requested 33000), and G215 Rain Garden Crew (score 86, community_priority 84, requested 27000). Sort by score descending, then community_priority descending, then requested_usd ascending; there are no ties affecting the top 3. Sorted eligible order is G207, G208, G210, G213, G215. select_top_n=3, so final winners are Tree Canopy Fellows ($42,000 requested, score 94), Cool Roof Block ($39,000 requested, score 92), and Flood Ready Neighbors ($50,000 requested, score 89). Exclusions: G201 wrong sector arts; G202 late after deadline; G203 requested 51000 over budget; G204 documents_complete=no; G205 draft status; G206 wrong sector transportation; G209 score 80 equals exclusive threshold; G211 winter_2025 wrong round; G212 test status; G214 internal status; G216 cancelled status; G217 wrong sector education; G218 late after deadline; G213 and G215 are eligible but below top 3.
